environment.s: Good On You Not Good Enough — limited transparency on supply chain. [goodonyou]

labor.s: KnowTheChain Forced-Labor Benchmark (2024): 13/100 (Apparel & Footwear). Below sector average — gaps in supplier disclosure, worker voice, or grievance remedy. Supply-chain signals: KnowTheChain 13/100; Fashion Rev 23%; UK MS statement.

animals.s: Good On You Not Good Enough — limited transparency on supply chain. [goodonyou]

health.s: 1 CPSC recall on record; sample hazard: the garments fail to meet the federal flammability standard for wearing apparel.

topHazards.label: The garments fail to meet the federal flammability standard for wearing apparel, posing a fire hazard to consumers.

sampleRecalls.title: Chanel Recalls Silk Scarves and Garments Due to Violation of Federal Flammability Standard
sampleRecalls.description: The scarves, dresses, skirts and blouses are made of 100 percent silk and come in a variety of designs. Nearly all items were returned to Chanel in May 2010.
hazards: The garments fail to meet the federal flammability standard for wearing apparel, posing a fire hazard to consumers.
products: Chanel silk scarves, dresses, skirts and blouses

sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking across the breakroom floor, slipped, and fell. Her head struck the countertop and her shoulder hit the cabinets. She sustained a concussion.
